name: User cannot log in with empty password
description:
As a user of the SauceDemo application
  I want to be able to log in with valid credentials
  So that I can access the product inventory

I want to be able to log in with valid credentials

steps.name: Given  a "standard" user is on the "login" page
When  the user enters their username
And  the user clicks the login button
Then  an error message should be displayed
And  the error message should contain "Epic sadface: Password is required"

labels.name: story
labels.value: User cannot log in with empty password

labels.name: testClass
labels.value: User cannot log in with empty password
